productDisplayName: Spykar Men Ranger Blue Black Check Shirts
description: Composition Sky blue and black check shirt made of 100% cotton that has white and beige accents, half sleeves with panel detail on the cuffs, collar with gingham panel detailing on the inseam of the collar, pointed panels on the shoulders, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, embroidered brand name over the left chest and curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Celebrate thecasual spirit in style in this spykar checked shirt. Designed for style and comfort, the cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and sports shoes and look great wherever you go. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
